candidate_definitions.text: 🦄 🎃 👻 V2Ray 路由规则文件加强版，可代替 V2Ray 官方 geoip.dat 和 geosite.dat，适用于 V2Ray、Xray-core、mihomo(Clash-Meta)、hysteria、Trojan-Go 和 leaf。Enhanced edition of V2Ray rules dat files, applicable to V2Ray, Xray-core, mihomo(Clash-Meta), hysteria, Trojan-Go and leaf.

[**V2Ray**](https://github.com/v2fly/v2ray-core) 路由规则文件加强版，可代替 V2Ray 官方 `geoip.dat` 和 `geosite.dat`，适用于 [V2Ray](https://github.com/v2fly/v2ray-core)、[Xray-core](https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core)、[mihomo](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/tree/Meta)、[hysteria](https://github.c…
EasyList filter subscription (EasyList, EasyPrivacy, EasyList Cookie, Fanboy's Social/Annoyances/Notifications Blocking List)
These lists are maintained by Fanboy (a.k.a. ryanbr), MonztA, Khrin and Yuki2718.
